description_long: This is a tall, rectangular shelving unit with a modern, minimalist design, featuring five evenly spaced horizontal shelves supported by a grid-like frame. The structure appears to be made primarily of metal, with a sleek, glossy black finish on the shelves and a lighter, metallic frame. The open sides and back provide visibility and access from multiple angles, making it suitable for displaying or storing items in urban environments such as offices, garages, or public spaces. The shelves are flat and sturdy, capable of supporting a variety of objects, while the overall construction suggests durability and stability. There are no visible doors, drawers, or handles, emphasizing its open-access functionality. The design is utilitarian yet stylish, fitting well in contemporary urban settings.
description: A tall, open, black metal shelving unit with five sturdy shelves and a minimalist, grid-like frame. Its sleek, glossy finish and open sides make it ideal for display or storage in urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing all five shelves and the open, grid-like frame structure.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow profile and the depth of the shelves.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open back and the alignment of the shelves within the frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the shelf depth and frame structure.
